description: Multi-asset Macro Regime Engine. Pulls VIX, futures (rates/oil/gold/copper), FX (DXY/JPY/CNH/MXN), classifies 6 sub-regimes + top-level GLOBAL_RISK_ON/OFF/REFLATION/etc. Foundational regime tag for research/critique/backtest.

schedule.name: justhodl-macro-regime-daily
